steps.title: Use the percent per serving
steps.content: One serving provides $6\%$ of the daily potassium allowance.

steps.title: Scale by the number of servings
steps.content: If Laura eats $x$ servings, the percent of the daily allowance is $6$ times $x$, so $p=6x$.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content: The equation $p=6x$ matches B. The percent is written as $6$, not $0.06$, because $p$ is measured in percent.
